sections.title: Left click "Use" item on the Squire

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: There you go, happy doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Sorry friend, but I can't do anything with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you repair my items for me?

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Of course I'll repair it, though the materials may cost you. Just hand me the item and I'll have a look.
